ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the recorded date */,
  "adjusted_price" REAL /* Adjusted price accounting for dividends and stock splits */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry category of the company */,
  "market" TEXT /* Stock market where the stock is listed (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "last_split_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock split */,
  "last_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the last dividend payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "moving_average" REAL /* Moving average calculated for the stock */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Calculated volatility for the stock */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Investment recommendation based on analysis (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "technical_indicator" TEXT /* Technical indicator used in the analysis (e.g., RSI, MACD) */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., fundamental, technical) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Score indicating the confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "analysis_source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis (e.g., in-house, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy and its parameters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was created */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of trading strategy (e.g., day trading, swing trading) */,
  "strategy_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the strategy (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "strategy_performance" TEXT /* Historical performance metrics of the strategy (e.g., average return, drawdown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy application */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy being applied */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock to which the strategy is applied */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of application of the strategy */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the strategy application (e.g., profit, loss, neutral) */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Price at which the strategy was entered */,
  "exit_price" REAL /* Price at which the strategy was exited */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Actual profit or loss resulting from the strategy application */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the strategy application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_applications_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_applications_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)
